channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Simple Height Adjustable Desk review: A mid-range standing desk with more depth than the 'simple' name might suggest
item.description: The Simple Height Adjustable Desk is, well, a simple height adjustable desk. It’s got sturdy legs, a decent desktop, especially for the money, and all of the basic features you want, without the fluff and price you don’t.

item.title: Sony Bravia 5 : ce TV Mini LED 55″ 120 Hz pensé pour les joueurs exigeants chute à moins de 900 €
item.description: Dalle Mini LED, ports HDMI 2.1 avec prise en charge de la 4K à 120 Hz, Google TV... Le récent Sony Bravia 5 de 55 pouces cumule les atouts. La bonne nouvelle, c'est qu'Amazon le propose à 899 euros, et non plus à 1 399 euros.

item.title: Avec iOS 27, vous allez pouvoir personnaliser le son de vos AirPods
item.description: Apple introduira un égaliseur pour les AirPods dans iOS 27, permettant aux utilisateurs de personnaliser les aigus, médiums et basses. Cette fonctionnalité s'appliquera également à l'audio de films, jeux et applications tierces comme Spotify et YouTube.

item.title: Nvidia next? Broadcom's value dropped by more than $440 billion as it posts disappointing forward outlook, prompting fears of AI bubble burst
item.description: Broadcom delivers stellar earnings report and in-line guidance, but investors respond by dumping shares, highlighting concerns about an AI bubble in the making.

item.title: Forget Siri AI and EQ for AirPods, Apple's key WWDC announcement is CarPlay video streaming — and I worry it'll make for more dangerous roads
item.description: Apple's CarPlay changes means you'll soon be able to watch videos in your vehicle. But please, please, please tread with caution

item.title: NordVPN lands on Meta Horizon — and VR privacy just got a whole lot easier
item.description: NordVPN is the third VPN to enter the metaverse, letting Quest users install a full VPN directly on their headset to encrypt traffic and mask their IP in VR.

item.title: Amazon Ember Artline Review: A Stylish Art Television
item.description: The affordable Artline doubles as a design piece and comes close to outshining the reigning champion of art TVs, the Samsung Frame Pro.

item.title: The Untold Story of the Google Buses That Took Over San Francisco
item.description: A decade ago, commuter buses attracted big protests in San Francisco. Years later, the city is still feeling the repercussions.

item.title: Hue’s SpatialAware finally made me appreciate color-changing lights
item.description: I've been a fan of Philips Hue smart lights since the early days. It's one of the few staples in my ever-changing smart home. However, when the Bridge Pro launched late last year, it wasn't immediately obvious why I should upgrade. The signature feature, MotionAware - which turns your lights into motion sensors - is […]

item.title: The Gigabyte A16 features an RTX 5060, Ryzen 7, and a 165Hz display — all for $999 thanks to a massive $500 price cut at Walmart
item.description: Looking for a gaming laptop on a budget? This Gigabyte A16 gaming laptop features a huge price cut at Walmart.

item.title: Preorder the Magic: The Gathering Marvel Super Heroes Jumpstart Booster Box at over $40 off on Amazon
item.description: Amazon has MTG's Marvel Super Heroes Jumpstart Booster Box from $119.94, with TCGplayer and Walmart slightly cheaper.

item.title: iRobot Roomba Max 705 drops to its best-ever price before Prime Day
item.description: Find the best robot vacuum deal. Save 45% on the iRobot Roomba Max 705 at Amazon.

item.title: Google Pixel 10 Pro drops to its lowest-ever price on Amazon
item.description: Get the best Google Pixel deal. Save 23% on the Google Pixel 10 Pro at Amazon.

item.title: Jimmy Kimmel slams Trump for walking out on reporter mid-interview
item.description: Jimmy Kimmel has responded to Trump storming out of his interview with NBC "Meet the Press" moderator Kristen Welker.

item.title: Republicans call on FBI to investigate anti-data center sentiment as a Chinese psyop – despite 55% of data center opposition headed by Republicans
item.description: Republican lawmakers call widespread opposition to data centers a Chinese influence campaign, despite 55% of public political oppositions coming from Republicans.

item.title: Why hackers hit canvas during finals week
item.description: The Canvas attack reveals a threat actor's strategy, and why it works.

item.title: Score a Fitbit Sense 2 for under $200 before Prime Day even starts
item.description: As of June 9, the blue mist/pale gold Fitbit Sense 2 is on sale for $197.90 at Amazon. This is 21% off its full price of $249.95.

item.title: Gay dating app Archer is shutting down, but when?
item.description: Match Group is shutting down Archer three years after its launch.

item.title: How AI is outpacing cybersecurity and what firms must do next
item.description: AI can now uncover vulnerabilities faster than firms can contain them, so how can firms respond?

item.title: Alex Vindman Survived Trump’s Retaliation Machine. Now He’s Running for Senate
item.description: In 2019, Alex Vindman testified during President Trump’s first impeachment trial–a decision that ended his military career. Now he wants to challenge the president from the halls of Congress.

item.title: Ce pack Samsung en promo à moins de 180 € inclut la Galaxy Tab A11 et une JBL Go 4 offerte
item.description: E.Leclerc propose un pack très complet avec cette Samsung Galaxy Tab A11 et la JBL Go 4. Si le duo est déjà intéressant, le prix l'est encore plus puisque l'ensemble se trouve pour 179 euros.

item.title: Samsung veut supprimer une étape agaçante pour parler aux IA : cette nouveauté pourrait faire la différence
item.description: Samsung simplifie l'accès à Bixby sur le Galaxy S26 avec One UI 9, ajoutant une option de déclenchement par geste. La nouvelle fonctionnalité Gesture Wake-up active Bixby automatiquement lorsque le téléphone est approché du visage. Cette innovation pourrait améliorer l'expérience utilisateur face à des assistants vocaux concurrents, comme ChatGPT et Siri....

item.title: Fin de SFR : le prix des forfaits n’augmentera pas à cause du rachat, voici pourquoi
item.description: Le rachat de SFR et le passage du marché des télécoms de quatre à trois opérateurs soulèvent de lourdes inquiétudes sur le prix des forfaits mobiles. Le consortium tentent depuis plusieurs mois de rassurer les consommateurs, mais les doutes persistent.

item.title: Streaming : les Français craquent et coupent le robinet des abonnements
item.description: Pour la première fois en quatre ans, les foyers français réduisent leur budget streaming, contraints par des prix en hausse et un budget sous pression, quitte à faire le tri dans leurs services.

item.title: CarPlay sous iOS 27 : la vidéo arrive enfin, mais l’Europe est privée du meilleur
item.description: Apple a profité de la WWDC 2026 pour détailler les nouveautés CarPlay d’iOS 27 : vidéo sur l’écran de bord, Siri nouvelle génération et quelques correctifs attendus. C’est gratuit, mais ça arrive seulement à l’automne, et l’Europe est déjà privée du plus gros morceau.

item.title: Siri AI : entre Apple et l’Europe, le ton est glacial
item.description: L'indisponibilité de Siri AI sur iOS et iPadOS en Europe cristallise des relations glaciales entre Apple et l'UE.

item.title: Five ways to be the most valuable person on your team (they’re not what you think)
item.description: You don’t have to be the highest performer to make the greatest contribution. Most people assume that being the most valuable person on a team means delivering the most. The best outputs. The deepest expertise. The highest score on whatever performance metric the org has decided matters this year.

item.title: Gemini Pro : baisse du prix de l’abonnement Google AI Plus
item.description: Les baisses de prix sont suffisamment rares pour être soulignées. Google a décidé de baisser le tarif de son offre Google AI Plus.

item.title: Le Xbox Game Pass a perdu des « millions d’abonnés » suite à sa hausse des prix
item.description: L’augmentation du prix du Game Pass de 50% a provoqué la fuite de « millions d’abonnés », admet le directeur stratégique de Xbox. Une situation qu’entend corriger la firme avec une nouvelle offre tarifaire et un remaniement du service.

item.title: Gaming gear of the month: here's everything we tested for June, and exactly what we thought
item.description: Including a pair of headphones that stunned us with their "exceptional audio performance", and an underwhelming controller from SteelSeries.

item.title: Anguished Parents, Crying Doctors: Life Amid Utah’s Measles Outbreak
item.description: The state’s outbreak means adapting to America’s new reality, in which vaccine-preventable diseases become common again.

item.title: Threats Against Politicians Skyrocketed After Meta Changed Its Speech Rules
item.description: New research finds that in the six months after Meta relaxed rules in the name of free speech, violent threats against lawmakers—including President Donald Trump—surged on Facebook.

item.title: Amazon employees ask Seattle to put the brakes on new data centers
item.description: On Tuesday, the Seattle City Council will vote on whether to enact a one-year moratorium on new data centers - just two months after several companies proposed building five large-scale centers in the city. Among the moratorium's fiercest supporters are current employees from the city's biggest tech giant, Amazon, who joined others to testify in […]...

item.title: 'Oh, this is not good for the neighborhood': Texas city sells 87 acres gifted by local farmer to data center developer for $10 million
item.description: Texas residents are opposing a massive data center planned on farmland originally donated decades earlier for public recreation purposes.

item.title: The backlash against AI, in 4 charts
item.description: Americans are quickly turning against artificial intelligence. As tech companies pour billions into AI, they face a growing risk: it’s incredibly unpopular. The backlash isn’t surprising. Do we really want technology that eliminates jobs, uses huge amounts of energy and water, erodes our ability to think, and poses a wide range of other risks, from making it easier for the government to surveil citizens to encouraging teen suicide? AI could obviously also be a useful tool—potentially helping develop better drugs and climate solutions, for example—but the haters have a point. And while AI may s...

item.title: Yes, that Pirate’s Booty rebrand is real
item.description: Captain Bob has a whole new look. Pirate’s Booty, the corn puff snack that’s been a ubiquitous part of American kids’ diets for decades, just got a rebrand that’s making some fans do a double take in grocery store aisles.

item.title: Lego’s largest, most complex set ever is a must-have for architecture lovers
item.description: Lego’s Sagrada Família captures the complex aesthetic and essence of Gaudí’s massive cathedral in Barcelona. There are 12,060 reasons to clear your weekend calendar. That is the piece count of the new Lego Sagrada Família. It’s the largest, most complex Lego set ever made by piece count, designed around one of the most visually audacious buildings in history. Priced at $800, it is not for everyone, but it sure beats paying for a flight to Barcelona to fight the swarms of tourists buzzing around this iconic landmark....

item.title: Major forecasters see mortgage rates staying above 6.0% through 2027—unless this happens
item.description: Unless something material shifts in the economy, most economic forecasters do not expect a significant short-term decline in mortgage rates. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: The next identity frontier: Verified workforce and the rise of agentic trust
item.description: Organizations must continuously verify human and agentic identities to combat rising digital impersonation risks.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for June 9, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for June 9, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for June 9, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1816 on June 9 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.

item.title: Apple just all-but-confirmed the iPhone Ultra in the iOS 27 beta
item.description: The biggest hint yet that a foldable iPhone is in the works has just been shared by Apple itself.

item.title: Preorder the Pokémon TCGs Mega Moonlit Clefable ex Tin at a record low price on Amazon
item.description: Amazon has the Pokémon TCG Mega Moonlit Clefable ex Tin down to $47.29, its lowest price yet ahead of launch.

item.title: Apple is making it easier to create Genmoji in iOS 27
item.description: MacRumors has discovered a new and easier Genmoji creation experience in iOS 27.

item.title: Roborocks Q10 S5+ robot vacuum and mop has dropped to under $300 ahead of Prime Day
item.description: As of June 9, the Roborock Q10 S5+ robot vacuum and mop is discounted to $279.99 at Amazon. This is 49% off its full price of $549.99.

item.title: Une trottinette électrique Ninebot à seulement 199 € ? C’est possible avec cette offre chez E.Leclerc
item.description: La Ninebot E2 E II n'est pas une trottinette réputée pour sa puissance. Elle est surtout pratique à transporter et parfaite pour les petits trajets. Elle a un autre avantage : son prix chute à 199 euros contre 279 euros habituellement.

item.title: iOS 27, macOS 27 : pourquoi ces mises à jour sont exactement ce que les utilisateurs attendaient
item.description: Les optimisations annoncées pour tous les systèmes d'Apple semblent tomber au meilleur moment pour les utilisateurs qui, à défaut de pouvoir s'acheter du nouveau matériel, veulent offrir à leurs appareils les meilleures performances possibles.

item.title: Gears of War E-Day : cet indice montre qu’on est passé à deux doigts d’un lancement sur PS5
item.description: Attendu le 6 octobre 2026 sur PC et Xbox, Gears of War : E-Day ne posera finalement pas son Lanzor sur PlayStation 5. Une éviction de dernière minute si l'on en croit une capture d'écran révélatrice dénichée sur Reddit.

item.title: Jon Stewart mercilessly questions Elmo over controversial NBA post
item.description: Jon Stewart questioned a version of Elmo on "The Daily Show" over a controversial X post about the NBA finals.

item.title: Exclusive: Get Bruvi’s Pod Coffee Maker for Nearly Half Off
item.description: Use this WIRED-exclusive coupon code to get the best deal on this high-design machine and biodegradable pods.

item.title: A Lego leader talks about the power of ‘solution diversity’
item.description: In business (and business school), it’s critical to approach a problem from multiple perspectives. The MBA is often considered the cornerstone degree for business leaders who aspire to reach the corner office. In fact, roughly 75% of the Fortune 500’s top 20 CEOs received an MBA or some other graduate degree. The chief executives of Apple, Microsoft, Blackrock, and JPMorgan all hold MBA degrees, among countless other leaders who have risen to the top after graduating from business school or pursuing further education later in their career. As a business school professor, I see the ambition in ...

item.title: La surpruissante console portable Asus ROG Xbox Ally X est enfin de retour à prix réduit
item.description: Toujours affichée à un tarif difficile à digérer, l’Asus ROG Xbox Ally X profite toutefois d’une petite remise de 70 euros. Une occasion rare de mettre la main sur cette console portable premium à un prix plus attractif.

item.title: Apple dévoile une panoplie d’outils pour mieux protéger vos enfants sur Internet
item.description: Lors de la WWDC 2026, Apple a présenté de nouveaux outils destinés à la sécurité des enfants sur Internet. Mis au point avec des spécialistes, ces outils aideront aussi les parents à accompagner leurs enfants dans leur vie numérique.

item.title: I pushed Apples new Liquid Glass slider to ultra. Heres how you can do it, too
item.description: Apple's iOS 27, now available as developer beta, comes with a Liquid Glass slider.
